package.description: Create a new KCL package, auto-discovered by the nx-kcl plugin.

search.description: Search Artifact Hub for published KCL packages to add as dependencies.

import-crd.description: Generate a KCL package from Kubernetes CRDs (local dir or a Crossplane provider repo).

composition.description: Scaffold a Crossplane v2 XRD + per-provider function-kcl Composition packages.
